screen.builders-shulkers.settings.title: Builder's Shulkers Settings
screen.builders-shulkers.settings.invent: Animate the lid when opening/closing a shulker box from your inventory.
screen.builders-shulkers.settings.pocket: Animate the lid when entering/exiting Pocket-Build mode on a held shulker box.
screen.builders-shulkers.settings.lid_ef: How the lid clears to reveal the contents in Pocket-Build mode: None keeps it solid, Dissolve dissolves it away, Disappear removes it instantly.
screen.builders-shulkers.settings.in_box: Render the selected block inside a shulker box in Pocket-Build mode.
screen.builders-shulkers.settings.open_c: Play the shulker box open and close sounds when opening/closing it from the inventory and in Pocket-Build mode.
screen.builders-shulkers.settings.other_: Show the lid animations and in-box items, and play the open/close sounds, for shulker boxes held by other players.
screen.builders-shulkers.settings.invent: When the inventory animation is off, choose whether the shulker renders opened or closed when in opened state.
screen.builders-shulkers.settings.pocket: When the Pocket-Build animation is off, choose whether the shulker renders opened or closed when in opened state.
screen.builders-shulkers.settings.show_i: Show the count of the selected item on the shulker box in Pocket-Build mode.
screen.builders-shulkers.settings.item_c: Scale of the selected item count shown on the shulker box in Pocket-Build mode (100% = vanilla scale).
gamerule.builders-shulkers.inventory_acc: Open shulker boxes from the inventory
Allow right-clicking a shulker box in the inventory to open and rearrange its contents.
gamerule.builders-shulkers.pocket_build: Pocket-Build from a held shulker box
Allow Pocket-Build: place or use a held shulker box's contents straight from the hotbar, without putting the box down.
